metric_caveats: This 25-record cap compares direct extraction-only against verify-repair on the same records.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
Artifact-bridge surface normalization is applied identically to both variants.
This config targets the fixed Gan synthetic validation split and must not be described as published Gan benchmark reproduction.
